nodes.title: Young animals are very much, but not exactly like, their parents
nodes.description: Young animals are very much, but not exactly like, their parents. Plants also are very much, but not exactly, like their parents.

academic_standards.description: Young animals are very much, but not exactly like, their parents. Plants also are very much, but not exactly, like their parents.

nodes.title: Animals have body parts that capture and convey different kinds of informatio...
nodes.description: Animals have body parts that capture and convey different kinds of information needed for growth and survival. Animals respond to these inputs with behaviors that help them survive. Plants also respond to some external inputs.

academic_standards.description: Animals have body parts that capture and convey different kinds of information needed for growth and survival. Animals respond to these inputs with behaviors that help them survive. Plants also respond to some external inputs.

nodes.title: Adult plants and animals can have young
nodes.description: Adult plants and animals can have young. In many kinds of animals, parents and the offspring themselves engage in behaviors that help the offspring to survive.

academic_standards.description: Adult plants and animals can have young. In many kinds of animals, parents and the offspring themselves engage in behaviors that help the offspring to survive.

nodes.title: All organisms have external parts
nodes.description: All organisms have external parts. Different animals use their body parts in different ways to see, hear, grasp objects, protect themselves, move from place to place, and seek, find, and take in food, water and air. Plants also have different parts (roots, stems, leaves, flowers, fruits) that help them survive and grow.

academic_standards.description: All organisms have external parts. Different animals use their body parts in different ways to see, hear, grasp objects, protect themselves, move from place to place, and seek, find, and take in food, water and air. Plants also have different parts (roots, stems, leaves, flowers, fruits) that help them survive and grow.

nodes.title: People also use a variety of devices to communicate (send and receive informa...
nodes.description: People also use a variety of devices to communicate (send and receive information) over long distances.

academic_standards.description: People also use a variety of devices to communicate (send and receive information) over long distances.

nodes.title: Some materials allow light to pass through them, others allow only some light...
nodes.description: Some materials allow light to pass through them, others allow only some light through and others block all the light and create a dark shadow on any surface beyond them, where the light cannot reach. Mirrors can be used to redirect a light beam. (Boundary: The idea that light travels from place to place is developed through experiences with light sources, mirrors, and shadows, but no attempt is made to discuss the speed of light.)

academic_standards.description: Some materials allow light to pass through them, others allow only some light through and others block all the light and create a dark shadow on any surface beyond them, where the light cannot reach. Mirrors can be used to redirect a light beam. (Boundary: The idea that light travels from place to place is developed through experiences with light sources, mirrors, and shadows, but no attempt is made to discuss the speed of light.)
